channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Legal Analyst Warns of Tough Questions for Todd Blanche Over Ties to Trump's Lawyer Boris Epshteyn
item.description: A legal analyst has warned that Acting U.S. Attorney General Todd Blanche will face intense scrutiny during his Senate Judiciary Committee confirmation hearing over his close ties to Boris Epshteyn, D...

item.title: Laboucane Maintains Lead in Rangeland Derby
item.description: The article highlights Laboucane's dominant performance at the Rangeland Derby, where he has extended his overall lead in the competition. Known for his aggressive riding style and strategic prowess, ...

item.title: Police arrest suspects linked to murder of anti-crime activist Thato Molosankwe
item.description: Police have arrested two men in connection with the murder of anti-crime activist Thato Molosankwe, describing the arrests as a major breakthrough in an investigation that has gripped the North West p...

item.title: Iranian military threatens NATO bases amid regional tensions
item.description: The article details Iran's military threats against NATO bases in the Middle East, escalating tensions in a region already destabilized by the Israel-Hamas conflict. Iran's Revolutionary Guard has war...

item.title: Marcos Highlights Arbitral Award's Impact on Filipino Livelihoods
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. emphasized the significance of the Philippines' legal victory over China in the West Philippine Sea, framing the 2016 arbitral ruling as a landmark decision that protect...

item.title: Nigerian Forces Successfully Target Bandit Commander and Disrupt Terrorist Activities
item.description: Troops from the Joint Task Force North-West, Operation Fansan Yamma, have made significant progress in counter-terrorism efforts. In Zamfara State, soldiers working with local volunteers repelled an a...

item.title: Ariana Grande exits American Horror Story season 13 as premiere date confirmed
item.description: Ariana Grande has confirmed her departure from the upcoming season of American Horror Story (AHS), which is set to premiere on September 24, 2025. The pop star, 33, was initially expected to star in t...

item.title: Rosie O'Donnell criticizes Trump's health and political decline
item.description: Rosie O'Donnell, a long-time critic of President Donald Trump, expressed concerns about his health and political viability during a live interview with CNN anchor Jake Tapper. O'Donnell, who relocated...

item.title: Police officer sentenced for reckless driving after 160kmh police car incident
item.description: A former Australian Federal Police officer, Ben Robert Wager, has been sentenced to six months' jail, suspended, after pleading guilty to aggravated dangerous driving. The court heard Wager drove at 1...

item.title: Norway Confident in World Cup Quarter-Final Clash Against England
item.description: Norway's national football team has shed their World Cup nerves and now believes they can defeat England in the quarter-finals, according to coach Stale Solbakken. The match, set for Saturday, marks t...

item.title: SAHRC Concludes National Inquiry Into Retailers' Food Pricing and Quality Practices
item.description: The South African Human Rights Commission (SAHRC) has concluded the second phase of its national food systems inquiry, focusing on pricing practices and quality standards of major retailers. The commi...

item.title: Tanzania's Political Leaders Call for Reconciliation and Dialogue
item.description: Tanzania's political landscape is facing renewed calls for reconciliation and dialogue as opposition leaders urge the government to address longstanding grievances. Freeman Mbowe, chairman of the main...

item.title: Spain and Belgium Draw 1-1 in Thrilling World Cup 2026 Clash
item.description: In a highly competitive match during the 2026 World Cup, Spain and Belgium delivered a thrilling encounter that ended in a 1-1 draw. The game, held at the Los Angeles Stadium, showcased the tactical p...

item.title: Nigeria Names 25-Player Squad for WAFCON 2026
item.description: Super Falcons head coach Justine Madugu has officially unveiled the 25-player squad for the 2026 Women’s Africa Cup of Nations (WAFCON), set to take place in Morocco from July 26 to August 16. The squ...

item.title: Senator Imasuen defends his reputation against false allegations of fugitivity and legal issues
item.description: Senator Neda Imasuen, chairman of the Senate Committee on Ethics, has strongly denied allegations linking him to fraud, bank robbery, and U.S. criminal investigations. In a detailed rebuttal addressed...

item.title: Analysis of Trump's Influence on Belgium's National Team Political Identity
item.description: The article explores the complex relationship between former U.S. President Donald Trump's political rhetoric and its potential impact on the political identity of Belgium's national football team. Wh...

item.title: Dutch Museum Honors Late Artist with Peanut Butter Floor Installation
item.description: A museum in Rotterdam, Netherlands, has recreated a famous conceptual art piece by late Dutch artist Wim T. Schippers, covering part of a gallery floor with peanut butter. The installation, titled 'Pe...

item.title: CFL Twins Clash in High-Stakes Match
item.description: Twin brothers Tyson and Jalen Philpot will face off in a highly anticipated CFL matchup as the Montreal Alouettes host the Calgary Stampeders. Both players have excelled this season, with Tyson leadin...

item.title: Hizbul Mujahideen commander discusses Pakistan-Kashmir ties in video address

item.title: Collingwood Triumphs in AFL Thriller, Jack Crisp Faces Suspension Over Tackle
item.description: Collingwood secured a dramatic four-point victory over North Melbourne in an AFL thriller at Docklands, with the match ending 13.11 (89) to 12.13 (85). Nick Daicos' pivotal play set up the winning goa...
